name: live-consultant
description: Niche-specific business consulting with complete skill assembly, a centrally updated hosted knowledge route, Sabri Suby's Sell Like Crazy system, direct-response marketing, sales, funnels, Meta ads, operations, decisions, and evidence-gated learning.

interface.longDescription: Infer the outcome and exact niche, assemble every relevant skill's complete stored knowledge, and tailor one coherent answer. The hosted read-only knowledge route receives compatible core updates centrally while the bundled skills preserve complete local framework access. Apply the full Sell Like Crazy buyer-to-sale system, create bold direct-response offers, design funnels and Meta experiments, solve sales and operations problems, and compound from corrections through private, evidence-gated project learning.
defaultPrompt: Diagnose the real bottleneck in my business.
Research my exact niche before recommending the strongest move.
Use $sell-like-crazy to build my complete Dream Buyer-to-sale system.
